caption: Elena here! The soft amber light of late afternoon spills across the cobblestones, painting the cherry blossoms in shades of pink and pale green. Walking through the library courtyard, feeling confident and alive, knowing that every step I take in this outfit is a declaration of my own power. There is a secret thrill in being known by students, a quiet confidence in my stride. 🌸☕️ #UniversitySecrets #SpringVibes #ConfidentTeacher
